As a former employee of Zara for the prior 3 years, the amount of collections Zara would churn out to appeal to the average person was ASTOUNDING. I’m talking every Monday and Friday we got shipment with new collections that required the visuals to consistently switch out the floor layouts, leaving the stockrooms flooded with racks and racks of brand new clothes already switched out with much newer ones. It was insane how often the floors switched and still do to this day. Also, the clothes all come with so much plastic wrapping and had very strong chemical odors that did cause some reactions from some employees handling it straight out of the boxes. Please think again from buying here, I highly advise it. It’s not worth it and the quality is DEFINITELY not worth the price. Even if it were, it’s not worth the torture of labor workers being exploited.
